query: SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION SEPARATOR ', ') as cols FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'weighingInstruments';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user KBF53B6TGXz9Z1D.root --database SQ6yxhwuwXauyoM9DVdVk2 --execute SELECT GROUP_CONCAT(COLUMN_NAME ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION SEPARATOR ', ') as cols FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = DATABASE() AND TABLE_NAME = 'weighingInstruments';

rows.cols: id, name, status, lastHeartbeat, createdAt, updatedAt, modelType, deviceCode, slaveId, comPortId, location, remark
